title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Laurus Labs

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Laurus Labs
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Laurus Labs in Thane offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Laurus Labs:
Laurus Labs is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Laurus Labs!
